title: YTD performance of Oracle-related ETFs as stock climbs to 9%
content:
[Oracle Reports Quarterly Earnings]
Justin Sullivan/Getty Images News

Shares of Oracle (ORCL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ORCL]) jumped about 9% on Wednesday after the IT giant reported fiscal third-quarter results and guidance that topped Wall Street's estimates.

In light of this, below is a list of ETFs related to Oracle (ORCL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ORCL]), ranked by their year-to-date performance. The rankings include Quant ratings of the ETFs.

The list is topped by the iShares Texas Equity ETF (TEXN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TEXN]), with a YTD performance of 9.81%. The Pacer Data and Digital Revolution ETF (TRFK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TRFK]) and First Trust NASDAQ Technology Dividend Index Fund ETF (TDIV [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TDIV]) follow, though both have slipped into slightly negative territory. The Direxion Daily ORCL Bull 2x ETF (ORCU [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ORCU]), a leveraged fund directly tied to Oracle’s stock performance, sits at the bottom of the list with a YTD decline of 44.76%.

Here is the list:

 	*
iShares Texas Equity ETF (TEXN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TEXN]), YTD perf: 9.81%, Quant rating: Not Covered

 	*
Pacer Data and Digital Revolution ETF (TRFK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TRFK]), YTD perf: -0.09%, Quant rating: Buy 3.96

 	*
First Trust NASDAQ Technology Dividend Index Fund ETF (TDIV [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TDIV]), YTD perf: -0.18%, Quant rating: Buy 3.83

 	*
FT Vest Technology Dividend Target Income ETF (TDVI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TDVI]), YTD perf: -0.94%, Quant rating: Sell 1.82

 	*
Gabelli Automation ETF (GGTL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GGTL]), YTD perf: -1.17%, Quant rating: Not Covered

 	*
BBH Select Large Cap ETF (BBHL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BBHL]), YTD perf: -3.69%, Quant rating: Not Covered

 	*
Janus Henderson Transformational Growth ETF (JXX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/JXX]), YTD perf: -8.11%, Quant rating: Strong Sell 1.44

 	*
iShares US Tech Independence Focused ETF (IETC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IETC]), YTD perf: -8.19%, Quant rating: Buy 4.01

 	*
Founder-Led ETF (FDRS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FDRS]), YTD perf: -11.86%, Quant rating: Not Covered

 	*
Polen Focus Growth ETF (PCLG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PCLG]), YTD perf: -12.12%, Quant rating: Not Covered

 	*
Founders 100 ETF (FFF [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FFF]), YTD perf: -12.95%, Quant rating: Not Covered

 	*
Themes Cloud Computing ETF (CLOD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CLOD]), YTD perf: -15.27%, Quant rating: Strong Sell 1.29

 	*
iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (IGV [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IGV]), YTD perf: -18.96%, Quant rating: Strong Sell 1.43

Direxion Daily ORCL Bull 2x ETF (ORCU [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ORCU]), YTD perf: -44.76%, Quant rating: Not Covered
